title: Spider Webs kinda burn
description: leftclicking a Web with a torch, soul torch, flint&steel or firecharge destroys it instantly.
body:
leftclicking a Web with a torch, soul torch, flint&steel, firecharge or item with fire aspect destroys it instantly.
leaving behind a dropping lava particle to indicate that it has been burnt.

now also works with lit torches from [realistic torches](https://modrinth.com/mod/realistic-torches).

I made this mod so i can use it with these mods:

[Spiders Create Webs](https://modrinth.com/mod/spiders-make-webs)

[Spiders Sensing you](https://modrinth.com/mod/spiders-looking-for-you)

[Nyfs Spiders](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyfs-spiders)

my modrinth profile [auiki](https://modrinth.com/user/auikiouy)

If you have suggestions, questions or something of the like, my discord is auiki

(made with Mcreator)
